race.comment: Tricky finish. CHARMING DEEL (8) is racing well without winning, solid in town two back before a good effort here in a BM70 last time behind Dark Simba in the Elmore Cup. This is a fair bit easier and she only rises 2kg with Childs taking over. Rates highly. OMNIC (10) is coming off a narrow BM62 win at Cranbourne last time out to break a run of consistent form. He maps for a nice run again and can make it a double. OLATUNDE (9) was below his best last time at Caulfield Heath over 1800m and has been given a let up since. Back in trip looks more suitable, respecting. CAMP CABLE (3) hasn't been far away in a couple of better races since winning two in a row, he won't need to improve much here.
